scripts.build:android:aab: pnpm dlx eas-cli@20.1.0 build --platform android --profile production --local --non-interactive --output ./android/app/build/outputs/bundle/release/eas-production-local.aab
scripts.build:android:aab:cloud: pnpm dlx eas-cli@20.1.0 build --platform android --profile production
scripts.build:android:apk: pnpm dlx eas-cli@20.1.0 build --platform android --profile preview --local --non-interactive --output ./android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/eas-preview-local.apk
scripts.build:android:apk:cloud: pnpm dlx eas-cli@20.1.0 build --platform android --profile preview
scripts.build:android:dev: pnpm dlx eas-cli@20.1.0 build --platform android --profile development --local --non-interactive --output ./android/app/build/outputs/apk/development/eas-development-local.apk
scripts.build:android:dev:cloud: pnpm dlx eas-cli@20.1.0 build --platform android --profile development
scripts.build:ios:dev: pnpm dlx eas-cli@20.1.0 build --platform ios --profile development --local --non-interactive --output ./ios/build/eas-development-local.tar.gz
scripts.build:ios:dev:cloud: pnpm dlx eas-cli@20.1.0 build --platform ios --profile development
